/CAL:STATE REASONS FOR STRIKING PRIOR ALLEGATION OR ARGUMENT/DAWT/X:COURTRESENTENCED DEFENDANT TO STATE PRISON FOR A PERIOD OF 6 YEARS, UPPER TERM;WITH ENHANCEMENT OF 5 YEARS ON 667(A)PC,/X:ENHANCEMENTS OF 1 YEAR ON 667,5(B)PC IS IMPOSED AND STAYED PURSUANT TO 654PC,/X:COURT STATES REASONS FORSTRIKING PRIOR ALLEGATIONS OF 667(D), 667(E) & 1170(D),/X:1) DEFENDANT WAS GAINFULLY EMPLOYED FOR TWO YEARS WITHOUT ANY OFFENSE,/X:2) NO WEAPON WASFOUND ON DEFENDANT,/X:3) NO CRIME OF VIOLENCE COMMITTED,/X:4) DEFENDANTWAS THE AIDER AND ABETTER,/X:5) NO NEW FACTS WERE INTRODUCED AT TRIAL WHENTHE PEOPLE MADE THE OFFER OF 9 YEARS STATE PRISON,  THE COURT FINDS THE MAIXMUM EXPOSURE TO BE PUNITIVE TO THE DEFENDANT FOR EXCERCISING HIS RIGHT TOTRIAL,/ /TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/X:COURT ORDERS AN AMENDED ABSTRACT BE PREPARED,/ /JUDMT AFFRMD/AJW/CH1:SP 6Y:U/CTSP:413/STATES/DNA/654:COUNT 2/ENH:CH1:TYPE 667(A)PC:TI 5Y:CS/ENH:CH1:TYPE667,5(B)PC:TI 1Y:S/X:TOTAL 11 YEARS STATE PRISON,/SECFEE/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/
/CAL:STATE REASON FOR STRIKING PRIOR ALLEGATION PC 1385 & STAY OF 667,5 & AMEND ABSTRACT/DAWT/CONTD:STATE REASON FOR STRIKING PRIOR ALLEGATION OR ARGUMENT/

/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/X:MATTER TRANSFERRED FROM D-22TO D-29,/X:TRIAL COURT TO SET FORTH IN WRITING REASON FOR STRIKING PRIORALLEGATION PER PC 1385 & IMPOSE & STAY EXECUTION OF PC 667,5(B),  AND TRIAL COURT TOAMEND ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT, IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, JUDGMENT AFFIRMED,/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/JUDMT AFFRMD/NP/CONTD:COURT TO STATE REASON FOR STRIKING PRIOR STRIKE ALLEGATION PC  1385 AND IMPOSE AND STAY OF 667,5(B) ON 10-31-08,/X:DOCKET MISSING,/
/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/X:MATTER WAS SCHEDULED INCORRECTLY IN DEPARTMENT 22,/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 29/TRANS 29:FORTHWITH TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/
